[Application]
name=org.signal.Signal
runtime=org.freedesktop.Platform/x86_64/25.08
sdk=org.freedesktop.Sdk/x86_64/25.08
base=app/org.electronjs.Electron2.BaseApp/x86_64/25.08
command=signal-desktop

[Context]
shared=network;ipc;
sockets=x11;wayland;pulseaudio;fallback-x11;
devices=all;

[Session Bus Policy]
org.freedesktop.secrets=talk
com.canonical.indicator.application=talk
org.ayatana.indicator.application=talk
org.freedesktop.PowerManagement=talk
org.kde.StatusNotifierWatcher=talk
org.freedesktop.ScreenSaver=talk
org.gnome.Mutter.IdleMonitor=talk
com.canonical.AppMenu.Registrar=talk
org.gnome.SessionManager=talk
com.canonical.Unity=talk
org.kde.kwalletd6=talk

[System Bus Policy]
org.freedesktop.login1=talk

[Environment]
SIGNAL_DISABLE_GPU=0
SIGNAL_DISABLE_GPU_SANDBOX=0
XCURSOR_PATH=/run/host/user-share/icons:/run/host/share/icons
SIGNAL_PASSWORD_STORE=basic

[Extension org.signal.Signal.Debug]
directory=lib/debug
autodelete=true
no-autodownload=true

[Build]
built-extensions=org.signal.Signal.Debug;org.signal.Signal.Sources;
